message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German General Social Survey (Allbus) 1970","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11531","justification":"Allbus 1970 includes data on political attitudes and voting behavior in Germany during the 1970s and is hosted by GESIS with DOI landing page"},{"title":"German General Social Survey (Allbus) 1974","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11532","justification":"Allbus 1974 provides comprehensive data on elections and voting patterns in Germany in the mid-1970s, hosted by GESIS"},{"title":"German General Social Survey (Allbus) 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.11533","justification":"Allbus 1978 offers information on political behavior around the 1978 election period in Germany, with a landing page at GESIS"},{"title":"Politbarometer 1977–1980 (West Germany)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10344","justification":"The Politbarometer series from 1977–1980 provides monthly public-opinion data including voting intentions, hosted by GESIS with DOI"},{"title":"German National Election Study 1972 (Gesis Data Archive)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12578","justification":"This dataset covers the 1972 federal election in West Germany, available from the GESIS Data Archive"},{"title":"German National Election Study 1976 (Gesis Data Archive)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12579","justification":"Dataset for the 1976 West German federal election study, hosted by GESIS with DOI landing page"},{"title":"German Parliamentary Election Results – Bundestag 1972","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10190","justification":"Detailed constituency-level election results for the 1972 Bundestag election in Germany, available via GESIS Data Archive"},{"title":"German Parliamentary Election Results – Bundestag 1976","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.10191","justification":"Detailed data on the 1976 Bundestag election outcomes by constituency, hosted at GESIS Data Archive"},{"title":"German Longitudinal Election Study (GLES): Pre-1980 Modules","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"Early modules of the longitudinal election study cover late 1970s political data in Germany, available from GESIS"}]}
